languages.text: {n}Мужчина окидывает корабль тоскливым взглядом.{/n} "Боюсь, что нет, Лорд-капитан. Потребны ремонтные таинства Адептус Механикус, а их возможно совершить только на борту флагмана. Нам нужна эвакуация".

{n}He casts a bleak glance at the shuttle.{/n} "I'm afraid not, Lord Captain. The ship requires recovery and the application of Adeptus Mechanicus repair sacraments. And those can only be done aboard the flagship. We need an evacuation."
languages.original_text: {n}Мужчина окидывает корабль тоскливым взглядом.{/n} "Боюсь, что нет, Лорд-капитан. Потребны ремонтные таинства Адептус Механикус, а их возможно совершить только на борту флагмана. Нам нужна эвакуация".

traits.locale_text: {n}He casts a bleak glance at the shuttle.{/n} "I'm afraid not, Lord Captain. The ship requires recovery and the application of the Adeptus Mechanicus repair sacraments. And those can be done only aboard the flagship. We need an evacuation."

{n}He casts a bleak glance at the shuttle.{/n} "I'm afraid not, Lord Captain. The ship requires recovery and the application of Adeptus Mechanicus repair sacraments. And those can only be done aboard the flagship. We need an evacuation."

{n}The pilot casts a bleak glance at the shuttle.{/n} "I'm afraid not, Lord Captain. The hull requires recovery and the application of Adeptus Mechanicus repair sacraments. Without that, it will not fly again."

{n}He casts a bleak glance at the shuttle.{/n} "I'm afraid not, Lord Captain. The ship requires recovery and the application of the Adeptus Mechanicus repair sacraments. And those can be done only aboard the flagship. We need an evacuation."

{n}He casts a bleak glance at the shuttle.{/n} "I'm afraid not, Lord Captain. The ship requires recovery and the application of Adeptus Mechanicus repair sacraments. And those can only be done aboard the flagship. We need an evacuation."

languages.text: {n}パイロットはシャトルに陰鬱な視線を投げた。{/n} 「申し訳ありませんが、無理です、ロード・キャプテン。船体の補修と、アデプトゥス・メカニカスによる修復の聖儀の施行が必要です。それがなければ、もう二度と飛びません」
languages.original_text: {n}The pilot casts a bleak glance at the shuttle.{/n} "I'm afraid not, Lord Captain. The hull requires recovery and the application of Adeptus Mechanicus repair sacraments. Without that, it will not fly again."

traits.locale_text: {n}パイロットはシャトルに陰鬱な視線を投げた。{/n} 「申し訳ありませんが、無理です、ロード・キャプテン。船体の補修と、アデプトゥス・メカニカスによる修復の聖儀の施行が必要です。それがなければ、もう二度と飛びません。」

languages.text: {n}Il lance un regard sombre à la navette.{/n} « J'ai bien peur que non, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Elle est très endommagée et il faudrait lui administrer les sacrements de réparation de l'Adeptus Mechanicus Or, on ne peut le faire qu'à bord du vaisseau amiral. Il va falloir évacuer. »
languages.original_text: {n}He casts a bleak glance at the shuttle.{/n} "I'm afraid not, Lord Captain. The ship requires recovery and the application of Adeptus Mechanicus repair sacraments. And those can only be done aboard the flagship. We need an evacuation."

traits.locale_text: {n}Il lance un regard sombre à la navette.{/n} « J'ai bien peur que non, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Elle est très endommagée et il faudrait lui administrer les sacrements de réparation de l'Adeptus Mechanicus Or, on ne peut le faire qu'à bord du vaisseau amiral. Il va falloir évacuer. »

languages.text: {n}Mekiğe umutsuz bir bakış atıyor.{/n} "Korkarım hayır Lord Kaptan. Geminin kurtarılması ve Adeptus Mechanicus onarım ayinlerinin yapılması gerekiyor. Bunlar ancak sancak gemisinde yapılabilir. Tahliye olmamız gerek."
languages.original_text: {n}He casts a bleak glance at the shuttle.{/n} "I'm afraid not, Lord Captain. The ship requires recovery and the application of Adeptus Mechanicus repair sacraments. And those can only be done aboard the flagship. We need an evacuation."

traits.locale_text: {n}Mekiğe umutsuz bir bakış atıyor.{/n} "Korkarım hayır Lord Kaptan. Geminin kurtarılması ve Adeptus Mechanicus onarım ayinlerinin yapılması gerekiyor. Bunlar ancak sancak gemisinde yapılabilir. Tahliye olmamız gerek."

languages.text: {n}Er wirft einen düsteren Blick auf das Shuttle.{/n} "Ich fürchte nein, Lord Captain. Das Schiff braucht Erholung und bedarf der Reparatursakramente des Adeptus Mechanicus. Letztere können allerdings nur auf dem Flaggschiff gewährt werden. Wir brauchen eine Evakuierung."
languages.original_text: {n}He casts a bleak glance at the shuttle.{/n} "I'm afraid not, Lord Captain. The ship requires recovery and the application of Adeptus Mechanicus repair sacraments. And those can only be done aboard the flagship. We need an evacuation."

traits.locale_text: {n}Er wirft einen düsteren Blick auf das Shuttle.{/n} "Ich fürchte nein, Lord Captain. Das Schiff braucht Erholung und bedarf der Reparatursakramente des Adeptus Mechanicus. Letztere können allerdings nur auf dem Flaggschiff gewährt werden. Wir brauchen eine Evakuierung."

languages.text: {n}El piloto lanza una mirada lúgubre a la lanzadera.{/n} «Me temo que no, Lord Capitán. La nave necesita reposo y los sacramentos de reparación del Adeptus Mechanicus, y ambos solo pueden administrarse a bordo de la nave insignia. Hemos de solicitar una evacuación».
languages.original_text: {n}He casts a bleak glance at the shuttle.{/n} "I'm afraid not, Lord Captain. The ship requires recovery and the application of Adeptus Mechanicus repair sacraments. And those can only be done aboard the flagship. We need an evacuation."

traits.locale_text: {n}El piloto lanza una mirada lúgubre a la lanzadera.{/n} «Me temo que no, Lord Capitán. La nave necesita reposo y los sacramentos de reparación del Adeptus Mechanicus, y ambos solo pueden administrarse a bordo de la nave insignia. Hemos de solicitar una evacuación».

languages.text: {n}他沮丧地瞥了一眼穿梭机。{/n}“恐怕不行了，舰长大人。船体需要回收，还得由机械修会执行修复圣仪。这些只能在旗舰上完成。我们需要撤离。”
languages.original_text: {n}He casts a bleak glance at the shuttle.{/n} "I'm afraid not, Lord Captain. The ship requires recovery and the application of Adeptus Mechanicus repair sacraments. And those can only be done aboard the flagship. We need an evacuation."

traits.locale_text: {n}他沮丧地瞥了一眼穿梭机。{/n}“恐怕不行了，舰长大人。船体需要回收，还得由机械修会执行修复圣仪。这些只能在旗舰上完成。我们需要撤离。”
